caption: A series of news broadcasts features several men seated behind a long, white table with a gold-colored cloth draped across the front. In the background, a large banner reads "INDIA" and "N NATIONAL DEVELOPMENTAL INCLUSIVE ALLIANCE." The men are dressed in formal attire, including white shirts and traditional Indian kurtas. As the scene progresses, the on-screen graphics and text overlays change. The initial segments feature red banners with white text saying "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "BREAKING," with names such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "विजेंद्र यादव" appearing. Later, the top red banner changes to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "BREAKING" remains at the bottom. Various names like "सबरात चौधरी," "संतोष सुमन," "विजय सिन्हा," and "सुमित कुमार" appear alongside their portraits. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right, and a timestamp progresses from "10:07 PM" to "10:08 PM."
